titles.text: Metal Sonic in Sonic the Hedgehog 2

descriptions.text:
Metal Sonic in Sonic the Hedgehog 2 swaps Sonic out for Metal Sonic from Sonic CD, you can choose between the Original moveset, Sonic CD, or the 2011 remaster moveset from Christian Whitehead's port of Sonic CD

Metal will once show Robotnik he's not a bot to be forgotten...
